query:
SELECT 
  bi.serviceExternalId, bi.description, bi.contactName, bi.customerExternalId,
  bi.lineAmount, bi.billingPlatform
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.serviceExternalId IN ('SS4HTBPC', 'SSWJNY05', 'SSNHX6ZD', 'SS011MSO', 'SS1NJNTP', 'SSL0OO3Q', 'SSQ16U1I')
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
SELECT 
  bi.serviceExternalId, bi.description, bi.contactName, bi.customerExternalId,
  bi.lineAmount, bi.billingPlatform

WHERE bi.serviceExternalId IN ('SS4HTBPC', 'SSWJNY05', 'SSNHX6ZD', 'SS011MSO', 'SS1NJNTP', 'SSL0OO3Q', 'SSQ16U1I')
LIMIT 20;
